reviews.review_msg: She is the BEST. I took intro to policing at Langara with her and she is the most incredible prof I've ever had. She makes the lectures so fun and she is trying to see things from the students' perspectives. Even though, I wasn't really into policing, I had really fun in her classes. She definitely grades everything so fairly.

Dr. Spicer was a great professor. she was generous and respectful while also seeing things from the students point of view. tests and exams/projects were very fair and did not attempt to trick the student, which is very good to have. overall i fully recommended Dr.Spicer to any student who is thinking of taking one of her courses

Very straightforward lectures that provide clear expectations for what she's looking for in the assignments. Since this was a W class there was an outline, bibliography and term paper to submit which were all very doable and she offered examples to follow. No complaints whatsoever, and TA Kelley was great, accessible for help and gave good feedback

Overall, I did not have too many issues with Val herself, however, the TA's made this course a nightmare. It seems that there was a lot of miscommunication going on between the TA's and Val which caused for a lot of confusion among what is expected for assignments. Criteria for assignments was also extremely vague.

The course was self-directed with a few quizzes, assignments, and a term paper. The assignment outlines were unclear, lectures & slides were unorganized, and going to campus for tutorial or lecture were not a good use of time. The course did not teach me anything new or important. Regardless, Dr. Spicer is understanding and nice.

prof is nice, and very caring but probably the most unorganized professor i have ever had.  Lacks communication with ta's, says one thing but really means something else, and gets mad at students when they ask for clarification.  I was really excited to finally take a class with her, but I wished i never did
Dr Spicer is fantastic!!!!!! Helpful, kind, passionate, and is clear in regards to what she expects from her students. Not too easy, not too hard. Highly recommend!

Val is an extremely kind professor! However the huge amount of miscommunication between her and the T/As causes a lot of unnecessary stress for students. The grading is extremely tough, and the criteria is unbelievably vague/unclear to the point where students are confused about basic information that is expected for papers and poster projects....
Very nice prof that really cares about her students.

I LOVE Val! Such a fun, caring, and funny prof. The TAs however were disorganized and took a while to mark our assignments. They sometimes gave poor feedback but would be helpful if you emailed them directly. Quizzes and final was online and open book so that helped with stress a ton. Lectures are not mandatory but were fun and helpful to go to.
